room.caption: [DCSV] And then nothing, but that happens. Everything is okay anyway.

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sWarpGateStand bShowArrow=false; exitType=0 newMapX=152; newMapY=152; toRoom=rDCS_A y+=32
if global.gameProgress<=4930 {instance_destroy()}
type=0 sprite_index=sEfEnergyRip image_speed=0.2 image_alpha=0.1 image_xscale=0.25 image_yscale=0.25
type=0 sprite_index=sEfEnergyRip image_speed=0.225 image_alpha=0.1 image_xscale=0.5 image_yscale=0.5 x-=16
type=0 sprite_index=sEfEnergyRip image_speed=0.25 image_alpha=0.1 image_xscale=0.75 image_yscale=0.75 x-=32
type=0 sprite_index=sEfEnergyRip image_speed=0.275 image_alpha=0.1 image_xscale=1 image_yscale=1 x-=48
type=0 sprite_index=sEfEnergyRip image_speed=0.3 image_alpha=0.1 image_xscale=1.5 image_yscale=1.5 x-=64

sprite_index=sDragoonPickup image_speed=0 image_index=1 soundToPlay=global.snd_Error stringToShow="You found a piece of the Dragoon." fadingTime=60 boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=4800 instance_destroy()
